Hardware Component File

N_H60B_TSR_UDS_20160725

System Identification and Configuration Data

Metadata

File reference N_H60B_TSR_UDS_20160725_20170127T130822.json
Source type JSON Data Array
Status
Validated

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol CAN
Baudrate 500000
Send ID 707
Receive ID 727
Functional Addr 40
Functional Name TSR_FRONTCAM

Associated Devices

[C1B00]CAMERA UNIT FAILURE ID:
[C1B01]NOT TO IMPLEMENT CAMERA FOV AIMING ID:
[U1000]CAN COMM CIRCUIT ID:
[U1010]CONTROL_UNIT(CAN) ID:
[U0122]LOST COMMUNICATION WITH VDC (P-RUN) ID:
[U0126]LOST COMMUNICATION WITH STRG (P-RUN) ID:
[U0428]INVALID DATA RECEIVED FROM STRG (CHECK SUM) ID:
[U0104]LOST COMMUNICATION WITH ADAS (P-RUN) ID:
[U0405]INVALID DATA RECEIVED FROM ADAS (CHECK SUM) ID:
[U1321]NOT TO IMPLEMENT CONFIGRATION ID:
[U1322]CONFIGURATION FAILURE ID:
[C1B09]POWER SUPPLY CIRCUIT (HIGH VOLTAGE) ID:
[C1B0A]POWER SUPPLY CIRCUIT (LOW VOLTAGE) ID:

The industry standard for automotive hardware ECU documentation. Providing precise wiring diagrams and pinout specifications for technicians and enthusiasts worldwide.
